source.title: Chart 1 Mappings - Symbols Abbreviations Terms and S-57 Objects

notes: Rows record precise Chart 1 Mappings names and S-57 object/attribute expressions outside the current Q-section crop table.
Rows without a printed source glyph are still valid generator targets; they carry expected_symbol guidance instead of a crop claim.
Familiar public iconography, including emoji-like metaphors, may be used only as semantic inspiration for newly drawn owned SVGs.

generation_target.visual_brief: Draw a compact magenta/purple faucet or water tap symbol suitable for a nautical chart small-craft facility marker.
style_notes: Use the source row for identity and S-57 mapping only.
Do not trace, vectorize, or recolor the source PDF crop.
Keep the glyph legible at small chart-symbol size.

generation_target.visual_brief: Draw a simple shower head with falling water drops for a small-craft facility marker.
style_notes: Use familiar shower iconography as semantic inspiration only.
Do not claim a source glyph crop when the table cell is blank.
Keep the symbol distinct from water tap and drinking-water targets.

generation_target.visual_brief: Draw a small refuse bin or trash barrel symbol for a small-craft facility marker.
style_notes: Use familiar trash-bin iconography as semantic inspiration only.
Do not claim a source glyph crop when the table cell is blank.
Avoid shapes that read as a buoy, tank, or generic square.
